title: stelis triapiculata
intro: Stelis triapiculata, also known as the Yellow-flowered Stelis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and unique growth habits. The medicinal properties of Stelis triapiculata lie in its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory contents. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Stelis triapiculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
